settings.heading: Find Your Perfect AutoLinkr Match
settings.text: Answer a few quick questions and we'll recommend the right AutoLinkr product for your car and needs. Takes under 60 seconds.

settings.liquid:
*Jebbit Quiz Placeholder — Adapter Selector*

Replace this block with your Jebbit embed code. Suggested quiz flow:
1. Does your car have factory CarPlay? → 2. What phone do you use? → 3. Do you want streaming? → 4. Split-screen vs standard? → Product recommendation

To embed: Jebbit Dashboard → Your Quiz → Share → Embed → Copy iframe code → Paste in theme editor

settings.heading: Factory CarPlay Car + Want Streaming
settings.text: AutoLinkr Pro™ is your best value choice — wireless CarPlay plus Netflix, YouTube, and Google Play for $79.99.

settings.heading: Factory CarPlay Car + Want Split-Screen
settings.text: AutoLinkr Elite™ unlocks split-screen multitasking with a faster CPU — run two apps simultaneously on your factory display.

settings.heading: Any Car, No Factory CarPlay
settings.text: AutoLinkr Tablet™ brings wireless CarPlay to any car — no factory CarPlay required. Works with iPhone and Android.

settings.heading: Want Dashcam Protection
settings.text: AutoLinkr Dash™ installs in any car with a 12V outlet. Dual 1080P, IR night vision, and WiFi app — from $69.99.

settings.heading: Quick Guide — Find Your AutoLinkr
settings.subheading: Or use the quiz above for a personalized recommendation
